summary: Phase 3 Slice C (Intake Forms) end-to-end testing completed. 37/37 backend pytest tests pass (17 new intake + 20 Phase-2 lifecycle still green). Frontend IntakeFormBuilder dialog opens, validates empty text and dropdown-without-options with toast errors, and the public booking flow correctly inserts a 4-step indicator (Service / Date & time / Intake / Your details) when the chosen service has intake questions, falling back to 3 steps when it has none. Missing required intake fields show a toast that names the field. Snapshot immutability + booking_intake_answers analytics collection writes (with lowercased answer_lower) verified via direct pymongo query.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for shadcn DialogContent — purely a11y warning, not a bug.

new_intake_tests: Book without required intake -> 400 (message includes question text)
Book with invalid email-type intake answer -> 400 'Invalid email'
Book success: booking.intake_answers contains snapshot of all questions
db.booking_intake_answers has one row per non-empty answer; answer_lower lowercased
BOOKING_CREATED activity log metadata.intake_count is correct
Snapshot immutability: editing/removing question doesn't mutate prior booking
PUT {questions:[]} clears form and subsequent booking succeeds w/o intake
frontend_flows_verified: /dashboard/services shows 'Add intake form' badge + edit-intake-{id} buttons for each service
Add question button adds rows; up/down/delete controls render
Save with empty question text -> toast 'Every question needs text'
Save with Dropdown but no options -> toast 'Dropdown ... needs at least one option'

Public /dr-anjali: pre-service stepper shows 3 dots (Service / Date & time / Your details). After picking Initial Consultation (which now has 3 intake questions) the stepper switches to 4 dots and includes 'Intake'.
Intake step renders short_text, dropdown ('Choose...'), and email questions with required (*) markers
Clicking Continue without filling required fields -> toast 'What brings you here today?: Required'

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 974 lines (was 852). Still recommend splitting into routers (auth, services, intake, bookings_pro, bookings_public, schedule) for maintainability — guideline cap is ~700 lines.
Pydantic BookingIn.intake_answers uses List[Dict[str, str]]; tighter model (e.g. List[IntakeAnswerIn] with question_id and answer fields) would give better validation errors.

validate_intake_answer() does not validate dropdown values are within the configured options. A user could send any string for a dropdown answer and it would be accepted. Suggest adding: if q.type=='dropdown' and ans not in q['options']: raise.
booking_intake_answers writes are sequential awaits inside a for-loop; for forms with many answers, use insert_many for a single round-trip.

EMAIL_RE is fairly permissive but accepts addresses without dots in domain in some shapes; given BookingIn.customer_email already uses EmailStr, consider reusing pydantic validation rather than a local regex inside the intake validator.
The IntakeFormBuilder shadcn DialogContent lacks aria-describedby (console warning) — small a11y miss.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_intake_forms.py (new — 17 tests with module-scope teardown that clears intake forms so other test files aren't broken)
test_credentials: anjali@practora.in / demo123 (slug dr-anjali); raj@practora.in / demo123; admin@practora.in / admin123
seed_data_creation: Tests POST TEST_-prefixed bookings with intake answers on the seeded Initial Consultation + Therapy Session services. Intake forms are cleared in teardown so Phase-2 lifecycle tests continue to pass. After full backend+frontend testing the Initial Consultation intake form was reset to empty via API.
mocked_integrations: Resend email (RESEND_API_KEY empty) -> send_email() falls back to [EMAIL:CONSOLE] log. Verified backend.err.log contains '[EMAIL:CONSOLE]' with subject 'New booking' after intake bookings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_intake_forms.py and /app/backend/tests/test_practora_lifecycle.py. Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://work-in-progress-112.preview.emergentagent.com MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 DB_NAME=practora_db pytest backend/tests -v. The intake module has a module-scope autouse teardown that clears intake forms on all of anjali's services to keep lifecycle tests green. New analytics collection: db.booking_intake_answers with fields {id, booking_id, pro_id, service_id, question_id, question_text, question_type, answer, answer_lower, created_at}. The booking schema now carries intake_answers (snapshot list). Public intake form endpoint is /api/p/{slug}/services/{id}/intake-form (note: review_request referenced /api/p/practora-bookings/services/{id}/intake-form which was a typo). Frontend stepper is dynamic 3-vs-4 dots based on service.intake_questions length.
